title: Model Compression Path
description: Build fluency in Model Compression inside Natural Language Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: AI Robots
steps.summary: AI Robots belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Model Compression. Start after AI in Architecture and AI and Architecture. It opens into AI in Companion Robots and AI in Collaborative Robots (Cobots).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM)
steps.summary: Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Model Compression. Start after Sharpness-Aware Minimization and SAM.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: OOB Error (Out-of-Bag)
steps.summary: OOB Error (Out-of-Bag) belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Model Compression. Compare it with Sharpness-Aware Reweighting (SAR) and Sharpness-Aware Reweight (SAR). It opens into Out-of-Bag Estimation (OOB Error).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.
